message:
test(quake-engine): add 11 unit tests for QuakeEngine

Cover engine creation without map, load_test_map, fire flash decay,
tick cap for large dt, toggle_run, strafe velocity, look yaw changes,
default crosshair/minimap state, render without map, render with
minimap overlay, and render with fire flash active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
